name: devops-doctor
description: Chat-first DevOps/SRE operator for GitLab CI/CD, AWS, Terraform, cost, security drift, observability, and safe rollbacks.

interface.shortDescription: Chat-first DevOps/SRE operator for GitLab CI/CD, AWS, Terraform, cost, security, and rollbacks.
interface.longDescription: DevOps Doctor helps Codex act as a chat-first senior SRE/DevOps operator for production engineering work. It collects GitLab, AWS, repo, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, cost, security, and observability evidence from the chat using local authenticated CLIs and read-only helpers. It follows a strict evidence contract: no invented current state, clear blockers when tools or permissions are missing, unsafe write actions gated by explicit approval, and fixes paired with validation and rollback.
defaultPrompt: Handle this GitLab or AWS issue from chat with evidence only.
Investigate this GitLab failed pipeline with glab and no guessing.
Investigate this AWS ECS/Fargate failure and give a safe rollback plan.
